name: Ji Shao
page_title: Ji Shao 嵇绍 [Jin] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Ji Shao (aka Xi Shao) was the son of Ji Kang, one of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. Twenty years after the death of his father he was nominated by Shan Tao, another of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove, to official post as a means of livelihood out of memory of his friendship with Ji Kang.

sections.short-biography: Son of Ji Kang. Nominated to office after his father’s death by Shan Tao.

Twenty years after the death of his father he was nominated by Shan Tao, another of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove, to official post as a means of livelihood out of memory of his friendship with Ji Kang.

full_text:
Ji Shao 嵇绍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Shao (嵇绍). Son of Ji Kang. Nominated to office after his father’s death by Shan Tao. Ji Shao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Ji Shao (aka Xi Shao) was the son of Ji Kang, one of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. Twenty years after the death of his father he was nominated by Shan Tao, another of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove, to official post as a means of livelihood out of memory of his friendship with Ji Kang.
